subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit the Lord of all dominion, Who, through His blessed word "The All-Merciful is established upon the throne," hath guided His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثناء مالک الملک را سزاست که بکلمه مبارکه الرحمن علی العرش استوی عباد خود را
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for prosperity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
